replies_today.reply: Iran-Iraq War (1980-88) was not fought alone by Iran. Syria, Libya, NK, China supported Iran. Iraq had support from US, UK, USSR, France. It ended in a stalemate, no victory.
Official greetings like this build collective identity. Political leaders use such moments to shape public sentiment and reinforce national unity.
Team USA prayed. Fox News calls it a 'powerful moment.' Religious justifications increasingly shape political actions. Observe how public faith is framed.
